delete_cave_confirm: This will delete the cave. Are you sure?
delete_place_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this cave place?
no_raster_maps_for_cave: No raster maps for this cave
no_point_defined: No redefined point for this place on the selected map
database_reinitialized: Database reinitialized and populated with test data. Application will now restart.
confirm_reinitialize_database: This will delete all data (caves, cave places, maps, etc.) and will populate database with test data. Application will be restarted after this operation. Do you want to continue?
reconfirm_reinitialize_database: Warning: by reconfirming all application data will be erased (caves, cave places, maps, etc.). Are you sure you want to continue?
confirm_reinitialize_database_empty: This will delete all data (caves, cave places, maps, etc.) and create an empty database. Application will be restarted after this operation. Do you want to continue?
reconfirm_reinitialize_database_empty: Warning: by reconfirming all data will be erased and an empty database will be created. Are you sure you want to continue?
database_reinitialized_empty: Database reinitialized (empty). Application will now restart.
camera_permission_required: Camera permission is permanently denied. Please enable it in app settings.
microphone_permission_required: Microphone permission is permanently denied. Please enable it in app settings.
confirm_restore_database_from_file: This will replace the current database with the selected file. The application will restart afterwards. Continue?
database_restored: Database restored. Application will now restart.
title: Title
save_before_define: The cave place must be saved before defining the point on a raster map!
gps_recorder_no_capture_yet: No snapshot captured yet. Tap 'Capture' once the live position has stabilized.
gps_permission_denied_message: Speleo Loc needs location permission to record GPS coordinates. Please grant the permission in app settings.
gps_location_service_disabled_message: Please enable location services on your device to record GPS coordinates.
search_place_by_qr_code_by_identifier: Search place by QR code id
qr_code_already_present: The same QR code is already present
existing_qr_code_will_be_replaced: A different QR code is already set for this place. Do you want to replace it?
delete_area_confirm: This will delete the cave area. Are you sure?
clear_area_confirm: Clear assigned area for this place?
discard_changes: Discard changes and leave without saving?
csv_file_requirements: The CSV file must contain a header row with column names.
csv_file_empty: The selected CSV file is empty.
csv_place_name_required: Cave place name column must be selected.
csv_cave_name_required: Cave name column must be selected in multiple cave mode.
csv_no_valid_rows: No valid rows found in the CSV file.
csv_continue_import_question: Do you want to continue with the import?
csv_overwrite_qr_question: Do you want to overwrite existing QR codes?
auto_save_on_switch: Save the current point automatically when switching to another place or map?
multiple_qr_matches_explanation: Multiple places with the same QR code identifier were found in different caves. Open one of them.
invalid_qr_code_detail: Invalid QR code (not parsable per rules)
filter_cave_places: Filter cave places by title or by QR code number
please_select_image_and_map_type: Please select an image and map type
confirm_remove_definition: Remove the point definition for this cave place on the current raster map?
duplicate_qr_message: Cave place "{title}" already uses QR code {qr}. Save with duplicate?
title_already_exists: A cave place with this title already exists in this cave
qr_already_exists: QR code {qr} is already used by "{title}"
tap_on_map_to_define_place: Tap on the map to define the point for the new cave place
settings_qr_generation_desc: QR code size, colors, error correction
settings_users_desc: Manage users and select the current one
settings_change_log_desc: Review recent edits tracked by the app
settings_sync_desc: Exchange data with other devices via archive files
ftp_sync_desc: Sync with a shared FTP or SFTP server
ftp_no_profiles_desc: Add an FTP, FTPS or SFTP endpoint to sync archives with other devices.
ftp_password_leave_empty_to_keep: Leave blank to keep the current password
ftp_passive_mode_desc: Recommended when the server is behind NAT
ftp_allow_invalid_cert_desc: Only enable for trusted self-signed servers
ftp_paused_hint: Resume to restart the current step from the beginning.
no_password_stored: No stored password for this FTP profile
sync_description: Export a sync archive to share with another device, or import an archive from another device. Conflicts are resolved by last-writer-wins on the updated_at timestamp.
sync_import_confirm_body: This will merge data from the archive into your current database. Newer local edits are kept; older entries are overwritten. Deletes from the archive are applied locally.
sync_import_cancelled: Import cancelled — no changes were applied
sync_conflict_mode_auto_desc: Silently overwrite older entries using the updated_at timestamp.
sync_conflict_mode_manual_desc: Prompt for each row whose fields differ from the local copy.
text_content_hint: Type or paste your text here...
tap_record: Tap the record button to start
populate_test_data_message: The database is empty. Would you like to populate it with sample caves and places for testing?
image_compression_desc: Compress and resize images on import
data_export_import_desc: Export or import all application data
diff_export_desc: Only include files added since the last full export
export_ftp_passwords_desc: Store FTP server credentials in the archive (handle with care)
import_success: Data imported successfully. Application will now restart.
import_mode_replace_desc: Replaces the current database and all files. Application will restart.
import_mode_merge_desc: Merges imported data with existing data. You can resolve conflicts.
confirm_replace_import: This will replace ALL existing data with the imported data. The application will restart. Continue?
no_qr_code_defined: No QR code identifier defined for this place
depth_invalid_number: Depth must be a valid number
depth_outlier_confirm: Depth value ({depth}) is outside the typical range (-1800 to +1800). Are you sure it is correct?
trip_delete_confirm: Delete this trip and all its points?
trip_log_method_change_confirm_body: The trip log will be regenerated from the recorded events using the selected method. Any manual edits will be lost.
trip_log_method_active_banner: New events automatically regenerate this log. Manual edits may be overwritten.
trip_log_journal_resumed: The team resumed the trip (paused for {duration}).
trip_log_narrative_closing: The trip concluded at {time} after a total of {duration}.
tours_reset_done: All help tours have been reset
tour_home_scan_qr_body: Scan a QR code to quickly find and navigate to a cave place.
tour_home_add_cave_body: Tap here to register a new cave in the system.
tour_home_docs_body: Browse all documentation files across all caves — photos, audio, notes, and more.
tour_home_cave_list_body: This is the list of all your caves. Tap a cave to view its places and maps.
tour_home_menu_body: Access additional options: surface areas management, CSV import, and app-wide navigation.
tour_cave_places_list_search_body: Filter the list of cave places by name or QR code.
tour_cave_places_list_add_body: Create a new place (station, junction, point of interest) inside this cave.
tour_cave_places_list_list_body: All registered places in this cave. Tap one to view details, edit coordinates, or manage its documents.
tour_cave_places_list_menu_body: Start a trip, edit cave details, import places from CSV, or delete this cave.
tour_cave_place_title_field_body: The name of this place inside the cave (e.g. 'Main Junction', 'Chamber A').
tour_cave_place_desc_field_body: Optional notes about this place — geological features, observations, hazards.
tour_cave_place_depth_field_body: The depth of this place relative to the cave entrance. Negative values for places above the entrance.
tour_cave_place_qr_field_body: The numeric QR code associated with this place. Scan with the QR button or enter manually.
tour_cave_place_tabs_body: Switch between raster map views to see or define this place's position on each map.
tour_cave_place_menu_body: Toggle GPS coordinate fields for this place.
tour_cave_trip_toolbar_body: Control your trip: stop, pause/resume, view the log, toggle between list and map views, or play back your route.
tour_cave_trip_map_body: See your trip route overlaid on the cave's raster map. Points are shown in chronological order.
tour_cave_trip_menu_body: Delete this trip or access other trip-related options.
tour_cave_trip_list_toolbar_body: Start a new trip, or control the active trip — pause, resume, stop, or view it.
tour_cave_trip_list_list_body: All trips for this cave, newest first. Tap a trip to view its details and route.
tour_cave_trip_list_menu_body: Access additional options for trip management.
tour_cave_trip_log_editor_body: Write free-form notes about your trip. Changes are saved when you press the save button.
tour_add_new_cave_title_field_body: Enter the name of the new cave you are registering.
tour_add_new_cave_desc_field_body: Optional description — location hints, region, or any notes about the cave.
tour_add_new_cave_area_dropdown_body: Optionally assign this cave to a geographic surface area for organization.
tour_csv_import_file_picker_body: Pick a CSV or TXT file from your device to import data from.
tour_csv_import_column_mapping_body: Map each column from your CSV file to the corresponding data field.
tour_csv_import_preview_body: Review the mapped data before confirming the import.
tour_csv_cave_place_import_content_body: Import cave places from a CSV file. Map columns to place name, QR code, depth, and cave area.
tour_csv_caves_import_content_body: Import caves from a CSV file. Map columns to cave name, description, and surface area.
tour_scanner_camera_body: Point your camera at a QR code to scan it. The result is returned automatically.
tour_scanner_torch_body: Toggle the camera flashlight for scanning in dark environments.
tour_map_viewer_map_body: Interactive cave map. Pinch to zoom, drag to pan. Tap a marked point to select that place.
tour_map_viewer_navbar_body: Scroll through cave places. Tap one to highlight it on the map and center the view.
tour_raster_map_selector_map_body: Tap on the map to define or redefine where a cave place is located on this raster map.
tour_raster_map_selector_navbar_body: Select which cave place you want to position on the map.
tour_generated_qr_viewer_pdf_body: View the generated QR code PDF. Pinch to zoom and scroll through pages.
tour_generated_qr_viewer_menu_body: Regenerate QR codes, or open QR generation and PDF output settings.
tour_geofeature_docs_toolbar_body: Change view mode (list, grid, categorized), sort documents, or create new ones — text, rich text, photo, audio.
tour_geofeature_docs_search_body: Filter documents by title, file name, or description.
tour_geofeature_docs_list_body: All documentation files linked to this feature. Tap to view, long-press for more options.
tour_cave_areas_add_body: Create a new area to group cave places within this cave (e.g. 'Upper Gallery', 'Main Chamber').
tour_cave_areas_list_body: All defined areas in this cave. Edit or delete areas using the icons.
tour_surface_areas_add_body: Create a new surface area to group caves by geographic region.
tour_surface_areas_list_body: All surface areas. Caves can be assigned to a surface area for organization.
tour_raster_maps_add_body: Upload a new raster map image (plan view, profile, or cross-section) for this cave.
tour_raster_maps_list_body: All raster maps for this cave. Tap to view, long-press to edit or delete.
tour_raster_map_form_title_field_body: Give this raster map a descriptive name.
tour_raster_map_form_type_dropdown_body: Select the type: plan view, projected profile, or extended profile.
tour_raster_map_form_image_picker_body: Select or change the raster map image from your device.
tour_edit_doc_file_title_field_body: Set a descriptive title for this documentation file.
tour_edit_doc_file_file_picker_body: Pick a file from your device to attach as documentation.
tour_camera_capture_preview_body: Take a photo that will be saved as documentation for the current feature.
tour_camera_capture_actions_body: Edit the photo in the image editor, or save it directly as a document.
tour_image_editor_canvas_body: Edit the image with drawing tools, filters, crop/rotate, and text overlays.
tour_text_doc_editor_content_body: Write your document content here. Use the save button in the toolbar when done.
tour_rich_text_editor_quill_body: Format your text with bold, italic, lists, headings, and more using the toolbar.
tour_sound_recorder_controls_body: Record audio: press the red button to record, pause, or stop. You can re-record from any point.
tour_sound_recorder_title_field_body: Name your audio recording before saving it.
tour_doc_file_viewer_content_body: View the contents of this documentation file — images, text, or PDF.
tour_sound_file_viewer_player_body: Play back the audio recording. Use the waveform to scrub to a specific position.
tour_settings_main_list_body: Tap a category to configure: language, image compression, QR code generation, PDF output, database, and data export/import.
tour_settings_main_menu_body: Access the settings menu from the home screen to customize your app preferences and manage data.
tour_settings_general_language_body: Choose the app display language. The app will update immediately after changing.
tour_settings_img_compress_toggle_body: Enable or disable automatic image compression when importing photos.
tour_settings_img_compress_profile_body: Select a preset (Low, Medium, High, Very High) or use Manual for custom settings.
tour_settings_qr_gen_output_kind_body: Choose whether to generate QR codes as a PDF document or as individual images.
tour_settings_qr_gen_size_body: Set the size in pixels for each generated QR code.
tour_settings_qr_gen_colors_body: Customize the foreground and background colors of the generated QR codes.
tour_settings_pdf_grid_body: Set how many columns and rows of QR codes appear per PDF page.
tour_settings_pdf_template_body: Customize the text under each QR code using variables: @place_title, @place_qr, @cave_title, @area_title, @date.
tour_settings_db_actions_body: Reinitialize, export, restore, or run SQL commands on the app database. Use with care.
tour_sql_runner_input_body: Type SQL queries or statements here. Press Run to execute them against the app database.
tour_sql_runner_output_body: Results or error messages from the executed SQL appear here.
tour_data_export_export_body: Export your app data as a ZIP archive. Optionally include documentation files and raster maps.
tour_data_export_import_body: Import a previously exported archive. Choose merge or replace mode for existing data.
show_home_toolbar_desc: Display scan/add/docs/settings buttons in a toolbar on the home page
auto_add_entrance_place_desc: Automatically create an entrance cave place when adding a new cave
scan_entrance_start_trip: You scanned a cave entrance. Would you like to start a new trip?
scan_entrance_exit_cave: You scanned a cave entrance. Are you exiting the cave? Stop the active trip?
scan_entrance_stop_other_trip: There is an active trip for cave "{cave}". Do you want to stop it?
scan_entrance_start_after_stop: Would you like to start a new trip for this cave?
confirm_mark_as_entrance: Mark this cave place as a cave entrance?
confirm_unmark_as_entrance: This cave place will no longer be a cave entrance. Continue?
other_entrances_defined_body:
Other cave places are already marked as entrances: {names}.

Do you still want to mark this one as an entrance?
confirm_mark_as_main_entrance: Mark this cave place as the main cave entrance?
confirm_unmark_as_main_entrance: This cave place will no longer be the main cave entrance. Continue?
main_entrance_already_defined_body:
There can be only one main cave entrance. Current main entrance(s): {names}.
Set the other one(s) as regular entrances first.
auto_tours_disabled: Automatic tours were disabled. You can still start Help tour manually from the menu.
template_none: No templates defined. Tap + to add an ODF or DOCX template.
template_unsupported_format: Unsupported format. Please select an ODT or DOCX file.
trip_export_no_templates: No templates available. Add a template first.
status_define_point: Click on the map to define a new point or change the interaction mode
status_select_place: Click on another point to select it
unsaved_changes_message: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save or discard them?
